title: Project Manager
description_raw:
Jonathan Lee Recruitment are working with a well-established engineering manufacturer in the West Midlands to recruit a Project Manager on a contract basis.

The client designs and manufactures bespoke industrial machinery and special-purpose automated production lines for the automotive and food processing sectors. This PM role is embedded within the engineering function and will drive delivery of a major machinery supply contract with a German automotive OEM customer.

Your responsibilities will include:
- Manage the end-to-end delivery of a bespoke mechanical assembly system (transfer line, multi-axis CNC machining cells, robotic handling) from design approval through FAT (Factory Acceptance Test) to SAT (Site Acceptance Test) and handover at the customer’s facility in Sunderland
- Own the programme schedule in MS Project from design freeze through mechanical build, electrical integration, FAT, disassembly, shipping, and commissioning
- Manage commercial change controls and client variation requests under the fixed-price supply contract
- Lead weekly project review meetings with cross-functional team (design, manufacturing, software, controls)

What we are looking for:
- A project manager who can read mechanical drawings and understand machine build sequences
- Experience managing delivery of mechanical plant, industrial machinery, or similar
- Effective stakeholder communicator at both shopfloor and boardroom level
- PRINCE2/APM qualification desirable

Rate: £600 per day (outside IR35)
Duration: 8 months
Start: 28 July 2026
Location: Birmingham head office + Sunderland customer site during commissioning
